meta.homeTitle: GGToolkit — Free tools & resources for gamers
meta.homeDescription: GGToolkit is the brand behind an ecosystem of free web tools for gamers, built to answer every in-game need with precision.
meta.toolsDescription: GGToolkit's full directory: calculators, databases, a games finder, a currency comparator, codes and PC help. Free and no sign-up.
meta.aboutDescription: What GGToolkit is: an ecosystem of free tools built for the gaming community.
meta.methodologyDescription: How we build and verify GGToolkit's tools and guides: sources, validation and updates.
meta.contactDescription: Contact GGToolkit: collaborations, bug reports, suggestions, press and advertising. We reply personally.

home.h1: GGToolkit: the ecosystem of free sites for gamers
home.intro: GGToolkit was born from a simple idea: every time we play, concrete questions come up —how far am I from that character, will this move KO, is that code still active— and you almost never find a clear, fast answer. So we built a family of free sites for gamers, each one expert at solving one of those questions. One brand, many sites, zero filler: find the answer and get back to the game.
home.featured: The GGToolkit ecosystem — our gaming sites

webs.intro: Our complete ecosystem of free sites for players, organized by category. Each one is independent, no sign-up, and built to solve one specific thing. Pick yours.
webs.ctaTitle: Not sure which one you need?
webs.ctaText: Tell us your question and we'll point you to the right GGToolkit site.

faq.a: Yes. Every GGToolkit site is free and most need no sign-up.

faq.q: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a: No. Everything runs in your browser, on desktop and mobile.

faq.q: How do I pick the site I need?
faq.a: They're grouped by category: calculators, databases, codes, game discovery, prices and hardware. Find the category for your question and dive in.
A team of players building what we'd want to use ourselves. Get to know us on the About page.

about.body:
GGToolkit is an ecosystem of free tools and resources for the gaming community. We build calculators, databases and comparators that answer concrete player questions: how far you are from pity, how much damage your Pokémon deals, which codes are still active, where to get resources without falling for scams, or which PC to build.

Our philosophy is simple: less filler, more answers. All our tools are free, no sign-up and multilingual. This hub gathers them so you can find them easily and discover the ones you don't know yet.

Behind GGToolkit is a team of players building what we'd want to use ourselves. Suggestions or bugs? Get in touch:

methodology.body:
At GGToolkit we take accuracy seriously. These are the rules we build every tool and guide by:

Verified data

Our calculators use formulas validated against recognised references (for example, Pokémon damage is validated against the Pokémon Showdown engine). Redeem codes are tested in-game before publishing. Prices are compared per real unit.

Updates

Databases and rankings are kept up to date with every relevant game update. We show the date when it builds trust.

No smoke

We don't promise "hacks" or magic shortcuts. If something is a scam (like free currency generators), we say so plainly. Our value is honest usefulness, not clickbait.

Free and open

Everything is free and no sign-up. We fund ourselves discreetly to keep the tools online.

contact.body:
Want to talk to GGToolkit? Behind the brand there's a team of players who read and personally reply to every message. Email us at the address below and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

These are the most common reasons to get in touch:

Collaborations & partnerships

Got a site, a channel or a gaming community? We love collaborating across the GGToolkit sites: content swaps, mentions, integrations or joint projects. Tell us your idea and we'll find a way to make it work.

Report a bug

If a calculator returns something odd, a code doesn't work or something won't load, tell us which GGToolkit site it happens on and how to reproduce it. We'll fix it fast.

Suggestions & ideas

Missing a tool, a game or a feature? The GGToolkit sites grow with what you ask for — your ideas shape what we build next.

Press & media

If you write about gaming and need data, quotes or assets about GGToolkit, reach out and we'll provide what you need.

Advertising

For advertising opportunities across the GGToolkit sites, contact us with the details of your proposal.

consent.text: We use cookies to analyse traffic and improve the site.

footer.tagline: Free tools for gamers. Less filler, more answers.
footer.disclaimer: GGToolkit is an independent project made by fans. Game trademarks belong to their respective owners.
